title: Qwen3-ASR MLX HTTP resource and extended gate validation

follow_ups.title: Define product RSS and CPU acceptance thresholds before Swift integration
follow_ups.reason: The extended run produced first resource evidence, but product acceptance still needs explicit thresholds and longer soak coverage.

follow_ups.title: Improve or compensate for long code-switch technical-term accuracy
follow_ups.reason: The long code-switch case passed incremental UX timing but had high WER from English/product-name substitutions.
